Scenario.Title: Test1

Engine.Name: 2x Stork-Wärtsilä 16V6ST Diesels, 2x Rolls-Royce Spey SM-1C Gas Turbines, CODOG

LM.Text: Side 'Blue' is now considered HOSTILE to Red
LM.Summary: Blue is now HOSTILE to Red

LM.Text: You'd better know what you're doing! I was on RTB!

Scenario.GameVersion: Command PE - Premium Edition v2.4.3 - Build 1777
